description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS Human Resources tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Date-tracked table storing personal information for all people in the system (employees, applicants, contacts). Always filter by EFFECTIVE_START_DATE and EFFECTIVE_END_DATE to get the current record.

columns.name: PERSON_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the person (Primary Key).

columns.name: EMPLOYEE_NUMBER
columns.description: The employee number (user-visible identifier for employees).

columns.name: APPLICANT_NUMBER
columns.description: Applicant number if the person is an applicant.

columns.name: FIRST_NAME
columns.description: First name of the person.

columns.name: LAST_NAME
columns.description: Last/family name of the person.

columns.name: FULL_NAME
columns.description: System-generated full name (Last, First).

columns.name: KNOWN_AS
columns.description: Preferred name or nickname.

columns.name: DATE_OF_BIRTH
columns.description: Date of birth of the person.

columns.name: SEX
columns.description: Gender: M (Male), F (Female).

columns.name: NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER
columns.description: National ID such as Social Security Number (SSN) or equivalent.

columns.name: NATIONALITY
columns.description: Nationality of the person.

columns.name: MARITAL_STATUS
columns.description: Marital status lookup code.

columns.name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.description: Work email address.

columns.name: CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG
columns.description: Y if the person is currently an employee.

columns.name: CURRENT_APPLICANT_FLAG
columns.description: Y if the person currently has an active application.

columns.name: PERSON_TYPE
columns.description: Indicates the type(s) of person record (EMP, APL, EX-EMP, etc.).

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this date-tracked record version.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this date-tracked record version (use SYSDATE for current).

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date the person record was first created.

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS (the business group).

tables.description: Date-tracked table storing job assignment details for employees, including their position, grade, location, and manager. Always filter by EFFECTIVE_START_DATE / EFFECTIVE_END_DATE and ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' for employees.

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the assignment (Primary Key).

columns.name: PERSON_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER
columns.description: User-visible assignment number.

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
columns.description: Type of assignment: E (Employee), A (Applicant), C (Contingent Worker).

columns.name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.description: Y if this is the employee's primary assignment.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS (the department/org unit).

columns.name: JOB_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_JOBS (the job role).

columns.name: POSITION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F (the specific position).

columns.name: GRADE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_GRADES (the salary/pay grade).

columns.name: LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_LOCATIONS_ALL (the work location).

columns.name: SUPERVISOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F (the direct manager's PERSON_ID).

columns.name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_ALL_PAYROLLS_F (the payroll this employee belongs to).

columns.name: PAY_BASIS_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_PAY_BASES (salary basis: Annual, Monthly, Hourly).

columns.name: EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY
columns.description: Employment category lookup (e.g., FR=Full Time Regular, PR=Part Time Regular).

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES (Active, Suspended, Terminated).

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this assignment version.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this assignment version.

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS (the business group).

columns.name: NORMAL_HOURS
columns.description: Normal hours worked per week.

tables.description: Stores all organization units including business groups, legal entities, operating units, and departments.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the organization unit (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: Name of the organization unit (e.g., department name, company name).

columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: Classification type of the organization.

columns.name: DATE_FROM
columns.description: Date the organization became effective.

columns.name: DATE_TO
columns.description: Date the organization was deactivated (NULL if still active).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the parent business group organization.

columns.name: INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_FLAG
columns.description: INT for internal organizations, EXT for external.

tables.description: Stores job definitions (generic roles, e.g., Software Engineer, Accountant) used across positions.

columns.name: JOB_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the job (Primary Key).

columns.name: JOB_DEFINITION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the job group definition.

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The job name (e.g., Software Engineer Level 2).

columns.name: DATE_FROM
columns.description: Date the job became effective.

columns.name: DATE_TO
columns.description: Date the job was deactivated (NULL if active).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Date-tracked table storing specific positions (a position is a specific instance of a job in an organization, e.g., CFO of Finance Dept).

columns.name: POSITION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the position (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The position name.

columns.name: JOB_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_JOBS.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS (the owning department).

columns.name: LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Position status: VALID, FROZEN, ELIMINATED.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this position version.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this position version.

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Stores salary/pay grade definitions used to group jobs and positions into pay bands.

columns.name: GRADE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the grade (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The grade name (e.g., Band 1, Grade A, Pay Level 5).

columns.name: DATE_FROM
columns.description: Effective start date for the grade.

columns.name: DATE_TO
columns.description: Effective end date (NULL if active).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Stores physical work location information (offices, sites, buildings).

columns.name: LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the location (Primary Key).

columns.name: LOCATION_CODE
columns.description: Short code for the location (e.g., NY-HQ, LON-01).

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description or full name of the location.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
columns.description: Address line 1.

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE_2
columns.description: Address line 2.

columns.name: TOWN_OR_CITY
columns.description: City or town.

columns.name: REGION_2
columns.description: State or province.

columns.name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.description: ZIP or postal code.

columns.name: COUNTRY
columns.description: Country code.

columns.name: INACTIVE_DATE
columns.description: Date the location was deactivated (NULL if active).

tables.description: Defines the different person types used to classify people (e.g., Employee, Applicant, Ex-Employee).

columns.name: PERSON_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the person type (Primary Key).

columns.name: USER_PERSON_TYPE
columns.description: User-defined name for the person type.

columns.name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.description: System classification: EMP, APL, EX-EMP, CWK, EX-CWK, CON.

columns.name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the person type is active (Y/N).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Date-tracked table linking a person to their current person type(s).

columns.name: PERSON_TYPE_USAGE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier (Primary Key).

columns.name: PERSON_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.name: PERSON_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_PERSON_TYPES.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this person type assignment.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this person type assignment.

tables.description: Defines the valid assignment statuses (e.g., Active Assignment, Terminated, Suspended).

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the status type (Primary Key).

columns.name: USER_STATUS
columns.description: User-defined status name (e.g., Active, Suspended, Terminated).

columns.name: PER_SYSTEM_STATUS
columns.description: System status: ACTIVE_ASSIGN, SUSP_ASSIGN, TERM_ASSIGN.

columns.name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.description: Y if the status is active.

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group (NULL for global types).

tables.description: Stores the employment period for each employee, including hire date and termination date.

columns.name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the period of service (Primary Key).

columns.name: PERSON_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.name: DATE_START
columns.description: The employee's hire date (start of employment).

columns.name: ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE
columns.description: The date the employee was terminated (NULL if currently employed).

columns.name: FINAL_PROCESS_DATE
columns.description: Date all HR/payroll processing is complete for this service period.

columns.name: LEAVING_REASON
columns.description: Lookup code for the reason for leaving (termination reason).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Date-tracked table defining payroll elements (e.g., Basic Salary, Overtime, Bonus, Health Insurance).

columns.name: ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the element type (Primary Key).

columns.name: ELEMENT_NAME
columns.description: The name of the payroll element (e.g., Regular Salary, Bonus).

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the element.

columns.name: CLASSIFICATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_ELEMENT_CLASSIFICATIONS (earnings, deductions, taxes).

columns.name: PROCESSING_TYPE
columns.description: N=Non-recurring (one-time), R=Recurring (each payroll period).

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this element type version.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this element type version.

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Date-tracked table storing the pay element entries assigned to employee assignments (the actual salary and benefit values).

columns.name: ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the element entry (Primary Key).

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.

columns.name: ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F.

columns.name: ELEMENT_LINK_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_ELEMENT_LINKS_F (the link defining eligibility).

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this element entry.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this element entry.

columns.name: ENTRY_TYPE
columns.description: Type of entry: E=Normal, A=Adjustment, D=Override, S=Replacement.

tables.description: Stores the actual values (amounts, rates, hours) for each element entry input value.

columns.name: ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier (Primary Key).

columns.name: ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F.

columns.name: INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F (defines what this value represents, e.g., Pay Value, Hours).

columns.name: SCREEN_ENTRY_VALUE
columns.description: The actual entry value stored as a VARCHAR2 (e.g., '5000', '40').

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date of this value.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date of this value.

tables.description: Defines the input values (parameters) for each pay element type (e.g., Pay Value, Number of Hours, Rate).

columns.name: INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the input value (Primary Key).

columns.name: ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F.

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the input value (e.g., Pay Value, Hours, Rate).

columns.name: UOM
columns.description: Unit of measure: M=Money, N=Number, T=Text, D=Date, H_HH=Hours.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.description: Start date.

columns.name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.description: End date.

tables.description: Records employee absences (e.g., sick leave, vacation, leave of absence).

columns.name: ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the absence record (Primary Key).

columns.name: PERSON_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.name: ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPES (type of leave).

columns.name: DATE_START
columns.description: Start date of the absence.

columns.name: DATE_END
columns.description: End date of the absence.

columns.name: ABSENCE_DAYS
columns.description: Total number of absence days.

columns.name: ABSENCE_HOURS
columns.description: Total number of absence hours.

columns.name: AUTHORISING_PERSON_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F (the manager who authorized the absence).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Defines the categories of absence/leave (e.g., Annual Leave, Sick Leave, Maternity Leave).

columns.name: ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the absence type (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the absence type (e.g., Vacation, Sick Leave).

columns.name: ABSENCE_CATEGORY
columns.description: Category lookup code (e.g., S=Sickness, O=Other).

columns.name: DATE_EFFECTIVE
columns.description: Date the absence type became effective.

columns.name: DATE_END
columns.description: Date the absence type was deactivated (NULL if active).

columns.name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to the business group.

tables.description: Stores salary proposals (pay changes) for employees including proposed salary and change reason.

columns.name: PAY_PROPOSAL_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the salary proposal (Primary Key).

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.

columns.name: PROPOSED_SALARY_N
columns.description: The proposed salary amount.

columns.name: CHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Effective date of the salary change.

columns.name: LAST_CHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date of the previous salary change.

columns.name: CHANGE_REASON
columns.description: Lookup code for the reason for the salary change (e.g., ANNUAL_REVIEW, PROMOTION).

columns.name: APPROVED
columns.description: Y if the proposal has been approved.

columns.name: DATE_TO
columns.description: End date of this proposal (start date of the next proposal).

common_joins.description: Get current employee personal info (always apply date filter for date-tracked tables)
Link current employee assignment to person
common_joins.join_condition: PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID = PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.PERSON_ID AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y'
PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.POSITION_ID = HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F.POSITION_ID AND HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE
PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.SUPERVISOR_ID = MGR.PERSON_ID AND MGR.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND MGR.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE (alias PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F as MGR)

common_joins.description: Link person to hire/termination date via period of service

common_joins.join_condition: PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F.ASSIGNMENT_ID = PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_ID AND PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE

common_joins.description: Link element entry values to element entry and input value
common_joins.join_condition: PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUES_F.ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID = PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F.ELEMENT_ENTRY_ID AND PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUES_F.INPUT_VALUE_ID = PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F.INPUT_VALUE_ID AND PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUES_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUES_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE

common_joins.description: Link current salary proposal to assignment
common_joins.join_condition: PER_PAY_PROPOSALS.ASSIGNMENT_ID = PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ASSIGNMENT_ID AND PER_PAY_PROPOSALS.APPROVED = 'Y' AND PER_PAY_PROPOSALS.DATE_TO IS NULL

common_joins.description: Link absences to person and absence type

example_queries.description: Get all active employees with their department, job, location, and manager.
example_queries.sql: SELECT p.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, p.FULL_NAME, o.NAME AS DEPARTMENT, j.NAME AS JOB, l.LOCATION_CODE AS WORK_LOCATION, mgr.FULL_NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, pos.DATE_START AS HIRE_DATE FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F p JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F a ON p.PERSON_ID = a.PERSON_ID AND a.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND a.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND a.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' AND a.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' JOIN HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS o ON a.ORGANIZATION_ID = o.ORGANIZATION_ID JOIN PER_JOBS j ON a.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID JOIN HR_LOCATIONS_ALL l ON a.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F mgr ON a.SUPERVISOR_ID = mgr.PERSON_ID AND mgr.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND mgr.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE JOIN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE pos ON p.PERSON_ID = pos.PERSON_ID AND pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL WHERE p.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND p.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND p.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG = 'Y' ORDER BY o.NAME, p.LAST_NAME

example_queries.description: Get headcount by department for active employees.
example_queries.sql: SELECT o.NAME AS DEPARTMENT, COUNT(DISTINCT p.PERSON_ID) AS HEADCOUNT FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F p JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F a ON p.PERSON_ID = a.PERSON_ID AND a.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND a.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND a.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' AND a.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' JOIN PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES ast ON a.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID = ast.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID AND ast.PER_SYSTEM_STATUS = 'ACTIVE_ASSIGN' JOIN HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS o ON a.ORGANIZATION_ID = o.ORGANIZATION_ID WHERE p.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND p.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND p.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG = 'Y' GROUP BY o.NAME ORDER BY HEADCOUNT DESC

example_queries.description: Get all employees hired in the last 90 days (new hires).
example_queries.sql: SELECT p.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, p.FULL_NAME, pos.DATE_START AS HIRE_DATE, o.NAME AS DEPARTMENT, j.NAME AS JOB FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F p JOIN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE pos ON p.PERSON_ID = pos.PERSON_ID AND pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F a ON p.PERSON_ID = a.PERSON_ID AND a.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND a.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND a.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' AND a.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' JOIN HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS o ON a.ORGANIZATION_ID = o.ORGANIZATION_ID JOIN PER_JOBS j ON a.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID WHERE p.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND p.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND pos.DATE_START >= SYSDATE - 90 ORDER BY pos.DATE_START DESC

example_queries.description: Get terminations for a given period with leaving reason.
example_queries.sql: SELECT p.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, p.FULL_NAME, pos.DATE_START AS HIRE_DATE, pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE, pos.LEAVING_REASON FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F p JOIN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE pos ON p.PERSON_ID = pos.PERSON_ID WHERE pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date AND p.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE AND p.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE ORDER BY pos.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE DESC

example_queries.description: Get current approved salary for all active employees.
example_queries.sql: SELECT p.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, p.FULL_NAME, o.NAME AS DEPARTMENT, j.NAME AS JOB, g.NAME AS GRADE, pp.PROPOSED_SALARY_N AS CURRENT_SALARY, pp.CHANGE_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_FROM FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F p JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F a ON p.PERSON_ID = a.PERSON_ID AND a.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND a.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND a.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' AND a.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' JOIN HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS o ON a.ORGANIZATION_ID = o.ORGANIZATION_ID JOIN PER_JOBS j ON a.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID JOIN PER_GRADES g ON a.GRADE_ID = g.GRADE_ID JOIN PER_PAY_PROPOSALS pp ON a.ASSIGNMENT_ID = pp.ASSIGNMENT_ID AND pp.APPROVED = 'Y' AND pp.DATE_TO IS NULL WHERE p.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND p.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND p.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG = 'Y' ORDER BY pp.PROPOSED_SALARY_N DESC

example_queries.description: Get total absence days per employee by absence type for the current year.
example_queries.sql: SELECT p.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, p.FULL_NAME, at.NAME AS ABSENCE_TYPE, SUM(aa.ABSENCE_DAYS) AS TOTAL_DAYS FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F p JOIN PER_ABSENCE_ATTENDANCES aa ON p.PERSON_ID = aa.PERSON_ID JOIN PER_ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPES at ON aa.ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPE_ID = at.ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPE_ID WHERE p.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND p.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE AND p.CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG = 'Y' AND aa.DATE_START >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') GROUP BY p.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, p.FULL_NAME, at.NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_DAYS DESC

important_notes: All tables ending in _F are date-tracked. Always join with EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= SYSDATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= SYSDATE to get the current record.
PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F: Use ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'E' for employees (A = Applicant, C = Contingent Worker) and PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' for the primary assignment.
PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F: Use CURRENT_EMPLOYEE_FLAG = 'Y' to filter for active employees.
PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE: ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL means the employee is currently active.
Salary information is in PER_PAY_PROPOSALS (reviewed/approved amounts) or in PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRIES_F / PAY_ELEMENT_ENTRY_VALUES_F for payroll element-level salary.
The BUSINESS_GROUP_ID groups all HR data within a legal entity. Always ensure queries are scoped to the correct business group if multi-org is configured.
